title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Building ML Models INFS3822
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity – Building ML Models Pre-requisites Please complete all Week 5 Pre-Seminar Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section. Please complete the following in-class activities: o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Upload Data to SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Exploration o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Transformation o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Feature Selection

Step by step guide Open your project on SAS Viya Model Studio. Please refer to Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya to create a project). Once your project is open, click on the Pipelines tab. Then, add a Linear Regression node to the Variable Selection node.

CRICOS Provider Code 00098G

Notice that a Model Comparison node is also added. This is useful to compare multiple models. Run the pipeline to build a Linear Regression Model

Open the Linear Regression results

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Linear Regression node.

Add a Neural Network node to the Variable Selection node

Make sure you select the post-training model interpretability using “Variable importance”. Then, run the project to build a Neural Network Model

Open the Neural Network results

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Neural Network node.

Add Decision Tree node to Variable Selection node

Make sure you select the post-training model interpretability using “Variable importance”. Then, run the project to build a Decision Tree Model

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Decision Tree node.
